mission.title: argo-workflows: Conditional artifact/parameter logic
mission.description: Conditional artifact/parameter logic. Requested by 27+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
In some steps/dag templates, there is a `when` conditional specifying which of two (or more) steps should run.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Conditional artifact/parameter logic
steps.description:
Use conditional expressions in artifact output references to handle branching workflows:
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: coinflip-
spec:
  entrypoint: coinflip
  templates:
  - name: coinflip
    steps:
    - - name: flip-coin
        template: flip-coin
    - - name: heads
        template: heads
        when: "{{steps.flip-coin.outputs.result}} == heads"
      - name: tails
        template: coinflip
        when: "{{steps.flip-coin.outputs.result}} == tails"
  - name: flip-coin
    script:
      image: python:alpine3.6
      command: [python]
      source: |
        import random
        result = "heads" if random.randint(0,1) == 0 else "tails"
        print(result)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Conditional artifact/parameter logic" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added conditional artifact and parameter logic allowing workflows to reference outputs from conditionally-executed steps. Use expressions like fromExpression to select artifacts based on which branch executed.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: coinflip-recursive-
spec:
  entrypoint: coinflip
  templates:
  - name: coinflip
    steps:
    - - name: flip-coin
        template: flip-coin
    - - name: heads
        template: heads
        when: "{{steps.flip-coin.outputs.result}} == heads"
      - name: tails
        template: coinflip
        when: "{{steps.flip-coin.outputs.result}} == tails"
    outputs:
      artifacts:
      - name: heads-result
        from: ????

  - name: flip-coin
    script:
      image: python:alpine3.6
      command: [python]
      source: |
        import random
        result = "heads" if random.randint(0,1) == 0 else "tails"
        print(result)
  - name: heads
    container:
      image: alpine:3.6
      command: [sh, -c]

outputs:
      artifacts:
      - name: heads-result
        from: "{{steps.heads.outputs.artifacts.heads-result}} if {{steps.flip-coin.outputs.result}} == heads else {{steps.tails.outputs.artifacts.heads-result}}"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
